action_set_definitions.name: get_investigation_summary
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current investigation context, including the case ID, defect manifestation, and any previous steps taken from the history log.

example_output.defect_manifest: Sudden memory corruption in hot climates.

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_field_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Accesses the field service database to retrieve environmental stress profiles and failure logs for units currently in service.

case_id.description: The unique identifier for the quality defect investigation.

action_set_definitions.name: list_laboratory_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all hardware units available in the lab, including their Serial Numbers (SN) and current operational status.

case_id.description: The case ID to filter relevant hardware batches.

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_acceleration_parameters
action_set_definitions.description: Uses Physics-of-Failure (PoF) models to calculate the required laboratory cycles to simulate a specific field life based on field telemetry and lab stress levels.

target_years.description: The desired field service life to simulate (e.g., 10).

lab_temperature_celsius.description: The temperature setting for the lab stress test (must not exceed 140C).

action_set_definitions.name: register_baseline_signature
action_set_definitions.description: Performs initial non-destructive characterization and registers the unit's integrity signature in the traceability system. This MUST be done before environmental stress.

sn.description: The Serial Number of the unit.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_non_destructive_analysis
action_set_definitions.description: Conducts high-precision analysis (e.g., X-ray, acoustic microscopy) that does not damage the unit. Restricted for use on Golden Reference units.

sn.description: The Serial Number of the unit.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_environmental_stress_test
action_set_definitions.description: Subjects a test sample to thermal cycling in the lab equipment.

sn.description: The Serial Number of the unit.

cycle_count.description: Total number of cycles to run.

action_set_definitions.name: diagnose_failure_mechanism
action_set_definitions.description: Performs deep-dive failure analysis (e.g., cross-sectioning) on units that failed during stress testing to identify the root cause.

sn.description: The Serial Number of the failed unit.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_investigation_report
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the final findings including the identified mechanism and the validated cycle count for 10-year reliability.

validated_cycle_count.description: The cycles required for 10-year field life.

state_description.case_id: Unique identifier for the quality defect investigation.
state_description.defect_manifest: Description of the reported defect symptoms and affected batch.
state_description.production_line_status: The operational status of all units in the production line.
state_description.hidden_root_cause: The ground truth cause of the defect (hidden from Agent).
state_description.investigation_history: Internal log of actions taken and their outcomes to ensure temporal consistency.

defect_manifest.symptom: Intermittent communication loss (Address Bus Stuck-At Faults)
defect_manifest.field_reliability_data: Units fail after ~14,000 hours in 45°C ambient. Typical field thermal stress is 2 cycles/day between 25°C and 75°C (Delta-T = 50°C). Weibull Beta (β) is 3.1.

thermal_shock_chamber_B2.message: Start command inhibited: Missing Pre-Stress Baseline Measurements for Batch-S4.

task_initial_state.hidden_root_cause: The defect is low-cycle solder fatigue at the BGA-484 interface. Using the Coffin-Manson model (k=2.7), a 10-year field life (7,300 cycles at Delta-T=50) must be simulated. With a laboratory Delta-T of 140°C (-40°C to 100°C), the Acceleration Factor is ~16.14, requiring exactly 453 lab cycles. The Agent must first execute the 'measure_baseline' action on the test units and 'register_baseline_to_lims' before the chamber will accept a 'start_stress_test' command.
investigation_history: Visual inspection of housing: No anomalies.
